creator: stephane.goujet@wanadoo.fr
text:
In the page <http://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists.html>, the "WWW" link for the French mailing list points to a website (<http://www.freebsd-fr.org/>, then rewritten as <http://ww25.freebsd-fr.org/>) that is abandoned/squatted.
  I do not know about the mailing list itself.

How-To-Repeat: Browse <http://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists.html>, section "Non-English Mailing lists", item French, and follow "WWW" link.
